_comment: Mutation testing is scoped to src/lib — the pure, fast, deterministic business logic. Components/actions/supabase clients are excluded: they are I/O- or DOM-bound, slow to mutate, and low-signal.
_thresholds_comment: Advisory only — break is null so CI never fails on mutation score. Run on demand (pnpm test:mutation) when changing src/lib logic; treat surviving mutants as a prompt to review, not a hard gate (many remaining are equivalent).
